title: mesosphaerum cymulosum
intro: Mesosphaerum cymulosum, also known as Mexican tea or bee balm mint, is a perennial plant native to Mexico and Central America. It has been used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, due to the presence of compounds like limonene and beta-pinene. The health benefits of Mesosphaerum cymulosum include reducing stress and anxiety, as well as alleviating respiratory issues such as coughs and colds. In herbal preparations, Mesosphaerum cymulosum is often used as a tea, infused oil, or tincture, and can also be added to baths for its soothing and calming effects.
